name: Claude Tool Calling for Reno
features_completed: Tool registry (registry.ts) — 13 tools catalogued with category, isDestructive, requiresApproval, requiredModules
Anthropic tool definitions (definitions.ts) — full JSON Schema for all 13 tools in Anthropic API format
Tool executor (executor.ts) — routes tool calls, checks for destructive tools, calls implementations, logs every call
Read tools (read-tools.ts) — 8 read-only tools querying live Prisma data with tenant isolation
Proposal tools (proposal-tools.ts) — 5 write tools that create AiExecProposal records, never execute directly
callClaudeWithTools() — Anthropic tool use loop (up to 8 iterations), accumulates all token counts
callClaudeForChat() updated — now routes through tool calling instead of simple completion
logToolCall() — every tool call written to ClaudeToolCall audit table (never throws)
ClaudeToolCall model — immutable audit log: tool name, input, output, status, duration, proposalId
Phase 33 reuses existing AiExecProposal with proposalType = create_task | create_workflow | create_invoice_draft | create_purchase_order | create_support_reply
GET /brain/proposals — list proposals by status (pending_approval default)
GET /brain/proposals/tool-calls — Claude tool call audit log with filters
TypeScript API: 0 errors | TypeScript Web: 0 errors
tools_implemented: read_dashboard_summary — cross-module business overview (revenue, employees, tickets, stock, POs, orders)
read_customer — CrmContact + CrmCompany search by name/email/ID
read_employee — HrEmployee search by name/email/code, includes department + current job title
read_invoice — SalesInvoice + line items by number/ID
read_inventory_stock — InvStockBalance by product name/code, shows on-hand/reserved/available
read_project — PmProject with task counts (open vs done), budget, progress
read_ticket — SdTicket with recent comments, SLA status, AI summary
generate_report — aggregated reports: revenue | hr_headcount | inventory | support | projects | procurement
create_task_proposal — creates AiExecProposal(proposalType=create_task), pending human approval
security_checks: PASS: All read tools scope every Prisma query to tenantId — no cross-tenant access possible
PASS: Destructive tools are blocked at executor level (isDestructive guard) — none are defined
PASS: All write actions create proposals only — Claude never directly modifies any data
PASS: Proposals require explicit human approve/reject via API endpoints
PASS: Every tool call logged to ClaudeToolCall (tenantId, userId, toolName, input, output, status, duration)
PASS: Employee tool never returns salary, payroll, or private financial data
PASS: Invoice tool returns only safe fields — no payment card data, no bank details
PASS: Tool loop capped at 8 iterations — prevents infinite tool call loops
PASS: logToolCall() catches all errors silently — audit failures never crash the AI response
PASS: Fallback to Reno Brain still triggers on any Claude error — existing safety net intact
PASS: Consent + API key + quota checks still run before any tool use (inherited from Phase 32)
PASS: RBAC: all /brain/proposals routes are behind standard tenant auth middleware

newModels: ClaudeToolCall — audit log for every tool invocation (tool_name, tool_input, tool_output, status, duration_ms, proposal_id)
reuseExistingModels: AiExecProposal — reused from prior phases; Phase 33 adds proposalType values: create_task, create_workflow, create_invoice_draft, create_purchase_order, create_support_reply

api_endpoints: GET /api/v1/brain/proposals — list AI execution proposals (status filter, pagination)
GET /api/v1/brain/proposals/tool-calls — Claude tool call audit log
files_modified: packages/database/prisma/schema.prisma — added ClaudeToolCall model + CoreTenant reverse relation
apps/api/src/brain/claude.service.ts — replaced callAI() with callClaudeWithTools() tool loop

critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverDirectlyDeletesData: PASS — no delete tools exist; all write tools create proposals only
critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverDirectlySendsPayments: PASS — no payment execution tool exists
critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverBypassesRBAC: PASS — all queries scoped by tenantId; auth middleware on all routes
critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverAccessesAnotherTenantsData: PASS — every Prisma query includes tenantId filter
critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverExposesSecrets: PASS — no secrets in tool output; employee tool excludes salary/payroll
critical_safety_rules_compliance.claudeNeverExecutesCriticalActionsWithou: PASS — write tools create pending proposals only
critical_safety_rules_compliance.riskyToolCreatesProposalNotExecution: PASS — all 5 write tools route through AiExecProposal

stop_and_wait: Do not begin Phase 34 until this Phase 33 report is reviewed and approved.
